  "claims": [
    "Excessive smartphone use at school interferes with education.",
    "Excessive smartphone use encourages cyberbullying.",
    "Excessive smartphone use may have adverse effects on teenage mental health, including increased rates of depression and suicide.",
    "Unrestricted use of smartphones by students at schools lowers pupil performance, particularly among low-achieving students.",
    "Unrestricted smartphone use promotes cyberbullying.",
    "Unrestricted smartphone use contributes to teenage anxiety, depression, and suicide.",
    "Between 2009 and 2017, the number of 14 to 17 year-olds experiencing clinical level depression in the last year increased by more than 60%.",
